name: An UPDATE PAID message with an invalid PSP results in RFC_SENT state
description: UPDATE PAID with psp_tax_code=None (invalid PSP) results in RTP state RFC_SENT

labels.value: Consumer sends RTP message to Sender with PAID status and invalid PSP tax code
